headline: 3 Reasons You Shouldn’t Get Excited By AMC Stock’s 22% Surge
summary: AMC Entertainment had the 27th-highest standard deviation on Monday. The bullish price surprise, up 22%, was driven by an excellent May box office, resulting in the highest attendance since 2019. Do not fall for the big gain. Here’s why.
